briefing: Today was a flat, directionless session with NASDAQ at exactly +0.0% and S&P barely +0.2% — no risk-on signal to justify deploying cash. Despite having $677 available and 4 open slots, the strategy memory is explicit: do not force buys on neutral days just to deploy capital, but instead wait for a genuine risk-on session (NASDAQ +2% or more). The top-scoring candidates — EQPT, CCC, CRCL — all show strong momentum signals and will remain on the watchlist for the next strong up day.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Dry powder refers to cash reserves held intentionally on the sideline, waiting to be deployed when the right opportunity appears. Rather than investing every available dollar immediately, experienced traders preserve cash so they can act decisively when conditions are clearly favorable — like a strong risk-on day with NASDAQ up 2% or more. Sitting on cash during flat or uncertain markets isn't inaction; it's discipline.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「乾火藥」（Dry Powder）是投資術語，指刻意保留在場外的現金儲備，等待合適時機再行部署。有經驗的交易者不會急於把每一分錢立即投入市場，而是保留現金，以便在條件明確有利時——例如納指大漲2%以上的強勢做多日——能夠果斷出手。在橫盤或方向不明的市場中持有現金，並非消極被動，而是紀律的體現。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted sideways on July 10th as investors paused ahead of the next round of earnings reports and Federal Reserve commentary, with neither sector leadership nor macro catalysts strong enough to push the major indices decisively in either direction. The S&P 500 eked out a fractional gain of 0.2% while the NASDAQ closed flat, reflecting balanced positioning between bulls holding recent gains and bears cautious about stretched valuations in large-cap tech. Volume was subdued across the board, suggesting institutional players were in wait-and-see mode rather than adding risk.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於7月10日整體橫盤整理，投資人在等待下一輪財報季及聯儲局官員發言期間普遍觀望，缺乏明確的板塊輪動或宏觀催化因素推動指數突破。標普500指數微漲0.2%，納斯達克指數則持平收場，反映多空雙方力量均衡——多頭守住近期漲幅，空頭則對大型科技股估值偏高保持警惕。全日成交量偏低，顯示機構資金傾向靜待訊號而非主動加倉。
